creator: ike@michaeleichorn.com
text:
The Kerberos chapter is out of step with CURRENT (and maybe 10?)

There are multiple errors in the Setting up a KDC section:

1) most of the code blocks after 'kadmin -l' are not accurate (there are more questions now)

2) rc.d variables are out of date:
kerberos5_server_enable is now kdc_enable
kadmind5_server_enable is now kadmind_enable
